# Cycle 99 вАФ B1 Aperiodic Moment-Curve Incidence

Classification: **BANKABLE_LEMMA / ROUTE_CUT / EXACT_NEW_WALL.**

I do **not** prove the polynomial bound in the live corrected-reserve range, and I do **not** produce a counterpacket. I bank an exact three-way reformulation, identify the object as sub-Johnson subgroup-RS list-decoding (route-cut), prove the easy regimes unconditionally, and вАФ the main new content вАФ reduce the target to a single explicit character-sum bound via an *exact* identity `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ N = main + error` with `main вЙ§ 1`.

## Setup and notation

`p` prime, `p вЙ° 1 mod n`, `H вЙ§ F_p^*` cyclic of order `n`, so `вИП_{xвИИH}(XвИТx) = X^n вИТ 1`. `U` monic of degree `s+1`, `s = k+ѕГ`, `k = ѕБn`, `ѕГ вЙ• Cn/log n`. `P=(P_1,вА¶,P_{ѕГ+1})` is the power-sum prefix of `U`; `v(ќЄ)=(ќЄ,вА¶,ќЄ^{ѕГ+1})`; `M_s={(p_1(S),вА¶,p_{ѕГ+1}(S)):SвКЖH,|S|=s}`; `ќШ_U = {ќЄвИИF_pвИЦH : v(ќЄ)вИИPвИТM_s}`.

## Lemma A (power-sum вЗФ divisor-remainder вЗФ codeword forms)

For `ќЄвИИF_pвИЦH` the following are equivalent:

1. `v(ќЄ) вИИ P вИТ M_s`.
2. `вИГ` monic `f | X^nвИТ1`, `deg f = s`, with `deg(U вИТ (XвИТќЄ)f) < k`.
3. `вИГ rвИИF_p[X]`, `deg r<k`, with `U вИТ r = (XвИТќЄ)f`, `f|X^nвИТ1`, `deg f=s`, `ќЄвИЙH`.

Proof. `T = SвКФ{ќЄ}` has `|T|=s+1` and `p_j(T)=p_j(S)+ќЄ^j`, so (1) вЯЇ `p_j(T)=P_j` for `jвЙ§ѕГ+1`. Since `p>s+1`, Newton's identities make `(p_1,вА¶,p_{ѕГ+1})` and `(e_1,вА¶,e_{ѕГ+1})` mutually determined; the monic polynomial with root multiset `T` is `(XвИТќЄ)f_S` with `f_S=вИП_{xвИИS}(XвИТx)`. Matching `e_1,вА¶,e_{ѕГ+1}` of `T` and `U` вЯЇ the top `ѕГ+1` coefficients (degrees `sвА¶k`) of `(XвИТќЄ)f_S` and `U` agree вЯЇ `deg(UвИТ(XвИТќЄ)f_S)<k`. `f_S` is a degree-`s` divisor of `X^nвИТ1`. Setting `r=UвИТ(XвИТќЄ)f` gives (3). вИО

**Injectivity `ќЄвЖ¶r`.** If `(XвИТќЄ)f = UвИТr = (XвИТќЄвА≤)fвА≤`, unique factorization forces the unique non-`H` linear factor to coincide: `ќЄ=ќЄвА≤`. Hence

> `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ #{deg-<k codewords r whose agreement with u:=U|_H is exactly s}`,

i.e. `ќШ_U` injects into the list of the `[n,k]` ReedвАУSolomon code on evaluation set `H` at agreement `s=k+ѕГ` (error weight `m=nвИТkвИТѕГ`). This is the precise list-decoding identification.

## Lemma B (reciprocal / affine-line-incidence form)

Let `≈®(X)=X^{s+1}U(1/X)` (so `≈®(0)=1`), `W=≈®^{-1}вИИF_p[[X]]`, and for `SвА≤=HвИЦS`, `|SвА≤|=m`, set `g_{SвА≤}(X)=вИП_{xвИИSвА≤}(1вИТxX)`. Using `вИП_{xвИИH}(1вИТxX)=1вИТX^n` and `ѕГ+2вЙ§n`, reversal of Lemma A(2) gives

```text
g_{SвА≤}(X) вЙ° (1 вИТ ќЄX)¬ЈW(X)   (mod X^{ѕГ+2}).
```

Writing `g_{SвА≤}=вИС_i(вИТ1)^i e_i(SвА≤)X^i` and `W=вИСW_jX^j` (`W_0=1`), this is

```text
e_i(SвА≤) = (вИТ1)^i ( W_i вИТ ќЄ W_{iвИТ1} ),   i = 1,вА¶,ѕГ+1,
```

an affine-linear image of `ќЄ`. Therefore `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ |вДУ вИ© E_m|`, where `вДУвКВF_p^{ѕГ+1}` is the explicit affine line above and `E_m={e(SвА≤):|SвА≤|=m}` is the elementary-symmetric image of `m`-subsets of `H`. (`ќЄ` is recovered as `ќЄ = e_1(SвА≤)+W_1`.) вИО

This is exactly the "moment curve against `M_s`" wall from Cycle 98, now in dual elementary-symmetric coordinates where the moment curve straightens to a line and the subgroup data sits in `E_m`.

## Route-cut (Johnson radius)

The list of codewords at agreement `вЙ• s` is `n^{O(1)}` **iff** `s > вИЪ(kn)` (Johnson). With `s=ѕБn+ѕГ`, `вИЪ(kn)=вИЪѕБ¬Јn`, this needs

```text
ѕГ > (вИЪѕБ вИТ ѕБ) n = вИЪѕБ(1вИТвИЪѕБ) n = ќШ(n).
```

Since `ѕГ=ќШ(n/log n)=o(n)`, the live range is **strictly below Johnson** for all large `n`. Consequence: the bound cannot follow from agreement/Johnson alone; any proof must use (a) the multiplicative-subgroup structure of `H` and (b) aperiodicity of `P`. Generic RS lists below Johnson can be exponential, so the "many codewords from one fixed `U`" structure plus subgroup arithmetic is essential. This formally cuts the agreement-only route.

## Unconditional partial results

- **Small field:** `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ pвИТn`. If `p = n^{O(1)}` the target holds trivially. The content is entirely the large-`p` (prize-scale `q_line`) regime.
- **Above-Johnson reserve:** if `ѕГ вЙ• (вИЪѕБвИТѕБ)n + 1`, then `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ n(nвИТk)/(s¬≤вИТkn) = n^{O(1)}` unconditionally (Johnson count). This pins the hardness exactly at `ѕГ=o(n)`.

## Main new reduction (exact identity, `main вЙ§ 1`)

Let `N = вИС_{ќЄвИЙH} #{SвКЖH,|S|=s : p_j(S)=P_jвИТќЄ^j, jвЙ§ѕГ+1} вЙ• |ќШ_U|`. Expanding each constraint with the additive character `ѕИ` and using `вИС_{|S|=s}ѕИ(вИС_{xвИИS}L_t(x)) = e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH})` where `L_t(X)=вИС_{j=1}^{ѕГ+1} t_jX^j`:

```text
N = (1/p^{ѕГ+1}) вИС_{tвИИF_p^{ѕГ+1}} ѕИ(вИТвЯ®t,PвЯ©) ¬Ј e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH}) ¬Ј S(t),
S(t) = вИС_{ќЄвИЙH} ѕИ(L_t(ќЄ)).
```

The `t=0` term is the exact main term

```text
main = C(n,s)¬Ј(pвИТn) / p^{ѕГ+1} вЙ§ C(n,s)/p^ѕГ вЙ§ 2^n / n^ѕГ = 2^{n вИТ ѕГ log n} = 2^{n вИТ Cn} вЙ§ 1
```

for `C вЙ• ln 2` (using `pвЙ•n+1`, `n^{n/log n}=e^n`). Since `N` is a nonnegative integer count and the expansion is exact,

```text
|ќШ_U| вЙ§ N = main + error вЙ§ 1 + |error|.
```

**Therefore the target `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ n^{O(1)}` is equivalent (up to the trivial small-`p` case) to**

```text
|error| = | (1/p^{ѕГ+1}) вИС_{tвЙ†0} ѕИ(вИТвЯ®t,PвЯ©) e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH}) S(t) | вЙ§ n^{O(1)}.
```

For `S(t)` Weil gives `|S(t)| вЙ§ ѕГвИЪp + n` (complete sum of `ѕИвИШL_t`, `deg L_t вЙ§ ѕГ+1 < p`). The genuinely open factor is the **elementary-symmetric transform** `e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH})`, for which only the trivial `|¬Ј|вЙ§C(n,s)` is known; the `p^{ѕГ+1}` terms then overwhelm. Cancellation must come from averaging over the moment pencil `tвЖ¶L_t`, and the resonant `t` (supported on indices `вЙ°0 mod M`, paired with `ќЉ_M`-periodic `P`) are exactly the ones with no cancellation вАФ which is why **aperiodicity of `P` is the hypothesis that kills them** (and why the periodic core is charged separately).

## Exact next wall

```text
W-CYCLE99-SUBGROUP-ELEMSYM-MOMENT-CHARACTER-SUM  (alias L-CYCLE100):

For H вЙ§ F_p^* of order n, aperiodic prefix P (P not ќЉ_M-invariant, M|n, M>1),
  | вИС_{tвЙ†0} ѕИ(вИТвЯ®t,PвЯ©) ¬Ј e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH}) ¬Ј вИС_{ќЄвИЙH}ѕИ(L_t(ќЄ)) |  вЙ§  p^{ѕГ+1} ¬Ј n^{O(1)}.
```

This is strictly smaller and fully explicit. Proving it вЯє PROOF of `L-CYCLE99`. A nonperiodic `P` forcing `|error|` superpolynomial вЯє COUNTERPACKET (the only known large-error mechanisms are periodic, so this would require a new aperiodic resonance вАФ a precise target for the falsifier).

A first sub-step worth isolating: bound the *single-frequency* moment slices `e_s({ѕИ(c¬Јx^j)}_{xвИИH})` for one monomial `L_t = c x^j`, which is a Gauss-sum-symmetric-function object; controlling these and their products is the natural ladder toward the full pencil bound.

## Checker spec (for Codex to run locally; not executed in this run)

Extend `cycle98_moment_curve_incidence_check.py` to `cycle99_divisor_line_incidence_check.py`, asserting on small `(p,n,k,ѕГ)`:

1. Lemma A: `ќШ_U` (power-sum form) `==` `{ќЄвИЙH : deg(U вИТ (XвИТќЄ)f) < k for some degree-s divisor f of X^nвИТ1}` `==` codeword-agreement-exactly-`s` set; and `ќЄвЖ¶r` injective.
2. Lemma B: for each active `ќЄ`, `g_{SвА≤} вЙ° (1вИТќЄX)W mod X^{ѕГ+2}` and `e(SвА≤)вИИвДУ`; report `|вДУвИ©E_m|`.
3. Identity: recompute `N` two ways вАФ direct pair count vs. the character expansion вАФ assert equality; print `main`, `|error|`, and confirm `main вЙ§ 1` for `CвЙ•ln2` cases.
Certificate fields: `{p,n,k,sigma,s,seed, external_theta, N, main, error_abs, aperiodic, johnson_gap=s^2вИТk n, status}`. Counterpacket trigger: aperiodic family with `error_abs/n^c` growing.

## Self-audit

1. **Proved:** Lemmas A, B (exact equivalences + injective embedding into subgroup-RS list at agreement `s`); the sub-Johnson route-cut; the two unconditional regimes; the exact identity `|ќШ_U| вЙ§ N = main+error` with `main вЙ§ 1`, reducing the target to `|error| вЙ§ n^{O(1)}`. **Not proved:** the elementary-symmetric/moment character-sum bound itself вАФ hence **not** the polynomial bound in the live range.
2. **Research/model + bankable reduction**, not an official-prize theorem.
3. **First failure line:** `W-CYCLE99-SUBGROUP-ELEMSYM-MOMENT-CHARACTER-SUM` (no proven cancellation in `e_s` along the pencil below Johnson). Minor side-conditions: `mainвЙ§1` needs `CвЙ•ln2`, `pвЙ•n` (both hold).
4. **Ledgers:** `p=q_line=q_code=q_gen=q_chal` here (single field), `n|pвИТ1`, `k=ѕБn`, `ѕГ` reserve; `2^{-128}` target вЖФ requiring poly list size; used consistently and not conflated.
5. **Yes:** quotient/periodic structure produces exactly the resonant `t` (supported on multiples of `M`) with no cancellation вАФ the periodic counterpacket вАФ so aperiodicity is required and is precisely what the error-bound must exploit. `ќЄвИИH` (contained) is separated upstream; same-slope collapse is handled since `ќЄвЖ¶r` is injective. Affine color normalization does not further reduce the numerator here.
6. **PLANвЖТPROOF:** prove the boxed character-sum lemma for aperiodic `P`. **PLANвЖТCOUNTERPACKET:** exhibit aperiodic `P` with superpolynomial `|error|` (must beat the periodic-only known resonances).

**Route to a full solve:** yes, conditional on the boxed lemma. Next exact object: bound the subgroup elementary-symmetric transform `e_s({ѕИ(L_t(x))}_{xвИИH})` along the moment pencil, starting from single-monomial `L_t=c x^j` slices (Gauss-sum symmetric functions) and building to the full `(ѕГ+1)`-frequency pencil, with aperiodicity removing the resonant frequency support.
